name: Sisson
description: A 20-minute AMRAP of a single rope climb, 5 burpees, and a 200m run — a short, repeatable circuit built for many rounds.
source_notes: crossfit.com/benchmark/sisson (official CrossFit Hero WOD page), retrieved 2026-07-09; official Rx includes a 20 lb (men) / 14 lb (women) weight vest
